add_activity_message.name: add_activity_message
add_activity_message.description: Append a non-destructive comment/message to one activity when write tools are enabled.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID to append a message/comment to. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream add-message response under full; default returns a terse append confirmation.

arguments.name: message
arguments.description: Required free-text message/comment content. Must be non-empty after trimming; the body is sent as content and is not logged by icuvisor.

add_or_update_event.name: add_or_update_event
add_or_update_event.description: Create or update a non-destructive calendar event such as a planned workout, race, or note.

arguments.name: category
arguments.description: Required upstream event category. Documented upstream categories include WORKOUT, RACE_A, RACE_B, RACE_C, NOTE, PLAN, HOLIDAY, SICK, INJURED, SET_EFTP, FITNESS_DAYS, SEASON_START, TARGET, SET_FITNESS; see icuvisor://event-categories. Custom athlete/account category values are passed through.

arguments.name: date
arguments.description: Required athlete-local event date as YYYY-MM-DD; interpreted in the configured athlete timezone.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional replacement for the upstream event description/DSL, not append-only notes. Omit on updates to leave unchanged. For WORKOUT updates, supplying description without workout_doc can replace existing structured steps; include the desired workout_doc to preserve or merge structure. Preserved verbatim, including whitespace and line breaks. May be supplied with workout_doc; use the <!-- icuvisor:steps --> sentinel on its own line to choose where serialized steps are inserted.

arguments.name: distance_meters
arguments.description: Optional planned distance in meters when supported upstream.

arguments.name: elapsed_time_seconds
arguments.description: Optional planned elapsed duration in seconds when supported upstream.

arguments.name: event_id
arguments.description: Optional upstream event ID to update. Omit to create a new event; this tool never deletes events.

arguments.name: external_id
arguments.description: Optional non-empty upstream idempotency key. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed; omit or pass blank to leave external_id unchanged/unset. Clearing an existing upstream external_id is not supported.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream event payload under event.full; default response matches get_event_by_id's terse event shape.

arguments.name: indoor
arguments.description: Optional planned-event indoor/trainer flag. Set true for indoor trainer rides; commonly paired with type VirtualRide, but this boolean controls intervals.icu's Indoor toggle.

arguments.name: moving_time_seconds
arguments.description: Optional planned moving duration in seconds when supported upstream.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Event title/name shown on the athlete calendar. Required when creating NOTE events; optional for other supported writes and updates unless upstream requires it.

arguments.name: tags
arguments.description: Optional replacement event tags, in caller-provided order. Omit to leave unchanged on updates; provide [] to clear all tags.

arguments.name: target_load
arguments.description: Optional planned training load / TSS equivalent when supported upstream.

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Required for WORKOUT events: upstream sport/activity type such as Ride, Run, Swim, or the athlete account's configured activity type. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed. Used with athlete sport settings to disambiguate structured workout_doc zone targets.

arguments.name: workout_doc
arguments.description: Optional structured WorkoutDoc. Serialized to the upstream workout DSL and merged with description when both are supplied. For WORKOUT updates, include the desired structured steps when changing prose so the replacement description/DSL preserves the workout structure. In each structured step, description is a label/comment only: do not include duration or distance tokens there; use duration seconds or distance instead. Zone targets are serialized using the WORKOUT type and athlete sport settings, adding metric suffixes such as Z2 Power, Z2 HR, or Z2 Pace when needed. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax.

examples.description: Breakfast: oatmeal and banana. Lunch: rice bowl. Carry 90 g carbs/hour for the long ride.
examples.name: Race-week nutrition plan

examples.description: Flight lands at 14:20. Pack pedals, charger, spare cleats, bottles, and race license.
examples.name: Travel logistics

analyze_correlation.name: analyze_correlation
analyze_correlation.description: Use when the prompt asks whether two analysis metrics are correlated or lagged together; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include paired samples; terse mode omits raw rows.

arguments.name: lag_days
arguments.description: Positive lag pairs x on D with y on D+lag.

arguments.name: metric_x
arguments.description: X metric. analysis_metric enum; choose one canonical value such as ctl, atl, tsb, weekly_tss, hrv, sleep_secs, if, or vi. Safe aliases are accepted by the server, but schemas enumerate canonical values only. Expressions such as ctl/atl are not supported.

arguments.name: metric_y
arguments.description: Y metric. analysis_metric enum; choose one canonical value such as ctl, atl, tsb, weekly_tss, hrv, sleep_secs, if, or vi. Safe aliases are accepted by the server, but schemas enumerate canonical values only. Expressions such as ctl/atl are not supported.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional sport/category filter for activity-backed metrics.

arguments.name: window
arguments.description: Inclusive athlete-local anchor window for metric_x.

analyze_distribution.name: analyze_distribution
analyze_distribution.description: Use when the prompt asks for an analysis metric's distribution, histogram, quantiles, or outliers; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: bucket_count
arguments.description: Number of equal-width histogram buckets when buckets is omitted.

arguments.name: buckets
arguments.description: Optional numeric bucket boundaries; values outside are counted below_range/above_range.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include sampled values; terse mode omits raw rows.

arguments.name: metric
arguments.description: Metric to summarize. analysis_metric enum; choose one canonical value such as ctl, atl, tsb, weekly_tss, hrv, sleep_secs, if, or vi. Safe aliases are accepted by the server, but schemas enumerate canonical values only. Expressions such as ctl/atl are not supported.

arguments.name: quantiles
arguments.description: Quantiles to compute; defaults to 0.25, 0.5, 0.75.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional sport/category filter for activity-backed metrics.

arguments.name: window
arguments.description: Inclusive athlete-local window.

analyze_efforts_delta.name: analyze_efforts_delta
analyze_efforts_delta.description: Use when the prompt asks whether best-effort power, heart-rate, or pace buckets changed versus baseline; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: baseline_window
arguments.description: Optional baseline inclusive athlete-local window; defaults to same length immediately before current_window.

arguments.name: current_window
arguments.description: Current inclusive athlete-local best-efforts window.

arguments.name: distance_meters
arguments.description: Required for pace; invalid for power or heart_rate.

arguments.name: duration_seconds
arguments.description: Required/defaulted for power or heart_rate; invalid for pace.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include current/baseline bucket series; terse mode omits raw curve arrays.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Intervals.icu sport/type to compare, e.g. Ride or Run.

analyze_trend.name: analyze_trend
analyze_trend.description: Use when the prompt asks whether an analysis metric is trending up, trending down, or changing versus baseline; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: baseline_window
arguments.description: Optional baseline inclusive athlete-local window; defaults to same length immediately before window.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include sampled series and rolling means; terse mode omits raw rows.

arguments.name: metric
arguments.description: Metric to trend. analysis_metric enum; choose one canonical value such as ctl, atl, tsb, weekly_tss, hrv, sleep_secs, if, or vi. Safe aliases are accepted by the server, but schemas enumerate canonical values only. Expressions such as ctl/atl are not supported.

arguments.name: rolling_window_days
arguments.description: Trailing usable-sample rolling mean window. Must not exceed current window; weekly metrics require multiples of 7.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional sport/category filter for activity-backed metrics.

arguments.name: window
arguments.description: Current inclusive athlete-local window.

apply_training_plan.name: apply_training_plan
apply_training_plan.description: Apply a workout-library training plan to the athlete calendar from an anchor start date.

arguments.name: conflict_policy
arguments.description: skip_existing leaves days with calendar conflicts untouched. replace_existing deletes only pure same-day WORKOUT conflicts before creating plan workouts and is accepted only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full; days with protected conflicts such as duplicate workouts, races, notes, holidays, sick/injured blocks, or unknown non-workout categories are skipped and reported.

arguments.name: dry_run
arguments.description: Safety default is true, even in safe mode. Set dry_run:false explicitly to create or replace calendar events.

arguments.name: plan_id
arguments.description: Required workout-library folder/plan ID to fetch server-side. Do not pass plan contents in tool arguments.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: Required athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD anchor date; workout day 1 is applied to this date and later plan days are relative to it.

compute_activity_segment_stats.name: compute_activity_segment_stats
compute_activity_segment_stats.description: Use when the prompt asks for mean, median, p90, normalized power, intensity factor, drift, or decoupling over an explicit activity segment, including first-vs-last distance comparisons, as the analyzer-family raw-stream exception; do not fetch get_activity_streams samples and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose canonical raw streams should be analyzed.

arguments.name: end_distance_m
arguments.description: Inclusive segment end distance in meters; must be greater than start_distance_m.

arguments.name: end_seconds
arguments.description: Inclusive segment end in elapsed activity seconds; must be greater than start_seconds.

arguments.name: ftp_watts
arguments.description: Required for stat=if only; positive athlete FTP in watts used as NP / FTP denominator.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include only sliced/calculation inputs needed to audit this stat. Terse mode never returns raw stream samples.

arguments.name: metric
arguments.description: Canonical stream metric for mean/median/p90 only: watts, heart_rate, cadence, velocity_smooth, distance, or time. Use velocity_smooth for pace comparisons and convert m/s to pace in the final answer. Omit for derived stats.

arguments.name: start_distance_m
arguments.description: Inclusive segment start distance in meters. Provide with end_distance_m and without time bounds.

arguments.name: start_seconds
arguments.description: Inclusive segment start in elapsed activity seconds. Provide with end_seconds and without distance bounds.

arguments.name: stat
arguments.description: Single segment statistic to compute. Use one of mean, median, p90, decoupling, drift, np, or if.

compute_baseline.name: compute_baseline
compute_baseline.description: Use when the prompt asks whether a metric is high, low, suppressed, elevated, or unusual versus a baseline window; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: baseline_end_date
arguments.description: Baseline inclusive athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: baseline_start_date
arguments.description: Baseline inclusive athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: current_end_date
arguments.description: Current inclusive athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: current_start_date
arguments.description: Current inclusive athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include baseline/current audit samples; default returns aggregate statistics only.

arguments.name: metric
arguments.description: analysis_metric enum; choose one canonical value such as ctl, atl, tsb, weekly_tss, hrv, sleep_secs, if, or vi. Safe aliases are accepted by the server, but schemas enumerate canonical values only. Expressions such as ctl/atl are not supported.

arguments.name: min_samples
arguments.description: Minimum usable baseline samples required before z-score calculation.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional exact case-insensitive activity sport/type filter where the selected source supports sport filtering.

compute_compliance_rate.name: compute_compliance_rate
compute_compliance_rate.description: Use when the prompt asks how well completed activities matched scheduled workouts, targets, sport, or event type; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: category
arguments.description: Optional upstream event category filter.

arguments.name: end_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: event_type
arguments.description: Optional exact case-insensitive event type filter.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include event-level pairing audit rows.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional exact case-insensitive sport/type filter.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local inclusive start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: target_metric
arguments.description: Target/actual metric used for compliance.

arguments.name: tolerance_percent
arguments.description: Absolute percent delta allowed for compliance.

compute_load_balance.name: compute_load_balance
compute_load_balance.description: Use when the prompt asks whether training distribution is polarized, pyramidal, threshold-heavy, or balanced across low/moderate/high intensity; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: end_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include per-source audit rows. Default returns aggregate zones/buckets only.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional exact case-insensitive activity sport/type filter.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local inclusive start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: zone_metric
arguments.description: Precomputed zone family to aggregate; raw streams are never fetched as fallback.

compute_zone_time.name: compute_zone_time
compute_zone_time.description: Use when the prompt asks for time in power, heart-rate, or pace zones over a date window; do not fetch get_* rows or streams and reduce them in chat.

arguments.name: end_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local inclusive end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include per-source audit rows. Default returns aggregate zones/buckets only.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional exact case-insensitive activity sport/type filter.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local inclusive start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: zone_metric
arguments.description: Precomputed zone family to aggregate; raw streams are never fetched as fallback.

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: Required item_type-specific content object. Validated against existing readable custom items before upload; see icuvisor://custom-item-schemas for schema guidance.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional custom item description. Preserved verbatim when supplied.

arguments.name: hide_script
arguments.description: Optional upstream hide_script flag for script/formula based custom items.

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Optional upstream image identifier or URL when supported by the custom-item type.

arguments.name: index
arguments.description: Optional display/order index for item types that support ordering.

arguments.name: item_type
arguments.description: Required upstream custom-item type. The value must match an existing readable schema sample, for example FITNESS_CHART, INPUT_FIELD, ACTIVITY_FIELD, ACTIVITY_STREAM, ACTIVITY_PANEL, ACTIVITY_HISTOGRAM, ACTIVITY_MAP, ACTIVITY_HEATMAP, TRACE_CHART, FITNESS_TABLE, or ZONES.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Required custom item name. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

arguments.name: visibility
arguments.description: Optional upstream visibility value. Omit to use intervals.icu defaults.

examples.description: Short coach-facing note captured on travel weeks.
examples.name: Travel fatigue note

create_workout.name: create_workout
create_workout.description: Create a reusable workout-library template, not a calendar event.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional free-text prose for the initial upstream workout description/DSL. This is part of the single upstream description/DSL field, not separate append-only notes. Preserved verbatim. May be supplied with workout_doc; use the <!-- icuvisor:steps --> sentinel on its own line to choose where serialized steps are inserted.

arguments.name: folder_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu workout-library folder ID. Must identify an existing folder owned by the athlete; top-level workout creates are refused upstream.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Required workout-library template name/title. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Required upstream sport/activity type for the workout template, such as Ride, Run, Swim, VirtualRide, or the athlete account's configured activity type. Used with athlete sport settings to disambiguate structured workout_doc zone targets.

arguments.name: tags
arguments.description: Optional workout-library tags to preserve on the upstream template, in caller-provided order.

arguments.name: workout_doc
arguments.description: Optional structured WorkoutDoc for the initial upstream workout description/DSL. Serialized and merged with description when both are supplied. In each structured step, description is a label/comment only: do not include duration or distance tokens there; use duration seconds or distance instead. Zone targets are serialized using the supplied sport and the athlete's sport settings, adding metric suffixes such as Z2 Power, Z2 HR, or Z2 Pace when needed. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax.

examples.description: 60m easy aerobic endurance. Keep it conversational.
examples.name: Endurance aerobic ride

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required opaque upstream activity ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

delete_custom_item.name: delete_custom_item
delete_custom_item.description: Delete one custom item definition by item_id.

arguments.name: item_id
arguments.description: Required opaque upstream custom item ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

delete_event.name: delete_event
delete_event.description: Delete one calendar event by event_id.

arguments.name: event_id
arguments.description: Required opaque upstream event ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

delete_events_by_date_range.name: delete_events_by_date_range
delete_events_by_date_range.description: Delete calendar events in a required athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD start_date/end_date range, optionally filtered by category.

arguments.name: category
arguments.description: Optional upstream event category filter. Omit to delete all event categories in the bounded date range.

arguments.name: end_date
arguments.description: Required athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD. Same-day ranges are allowed; range size is capped at 31 inclusive days.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: Required athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD. Open-ended ranges are rejected.

delete_gear.name: delete_gear
delete_gear.description: Delete one gear item by gear_id.

arguments.name: gear_id
arguments.description: Required opaque upstream gear ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

delete_sport_settings.name: delete_sport_settings
delete_sport_settings.description: Delete one sport-settings definition by sport_settings_id.

arguments.name: sport_settings_id
arguments.description: Required opaque upstream sport-settings ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

delete_workout.name: delete_workout
delete_workout.description: Delete one reusable workout-library template by workout_id.

arguments.name: workout_id
arguments.description: Required upstream workout-library template ID to delete. This destructive operation has no confirm argument; the tool is registered only when ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

get_activities.name: get_activities
get_activities.description: Scan an athlete-local date window and return a paginated activity index: terse unit-disambiguated summary rows with IDs, source/device hints, tags, custom_fields, and Strava-unavailable markers.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream activity fields and preserve upstream nulls; default terse rows are unit-disambiguated and null-stripped.

arguments.name: include_unnamed
arguments.description: When false, drop rows with an empty activity name after bounded pagination.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Optional local ISO-8601 end date/date-time; defaults upstream to now.

arguments.name: next_page_token
arguments.description: Opaque token from _meta.next_page_token for the next page. Do not edit.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Required local ISO-8601 start date/date-time unless next_page_token is supplied.

arguments.name: page_size
arguments.description: Number of terse rows to return per page; values above 200 are capped.

arguments.name: route_id
arguments.description: Optional intervals.icu route ID filter.

get_activity_details.name: get_activity_details
get_activity_details.description: Get one activity's terse metadata and metrics by activity_id, including upstream activity tags when returned, calories_burned as active/exercise calories (distinct from wellness kcal_consumed), carbs_ingested_g for athlete-logged carb intake, carbs_used_g for upstream carbs-burned estimate, and custom_fields for athlete-defined activity custom fields when upstream provides them.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: intervals.icu activity ID.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: Include raw upstream fields; default terse mode strips nulls and returns normalized fields.

get_activity_histogram.name: get_activity_histogram
get_activity_histogram.description: Use when the prompt asks for a single activity's power, heart-rate, or pace distribution; do not fetch get_activity_streams samples and bin them in chat.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose stream distribution should be summarized.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, preserve diagnostic metadata. Raw stream samples are never returned by this histogram tool.

arguments.name: metric
arguments.description: Histogram metric enum for a single activity; schemas enumerate canonical values only. Safe aliases such as power, hr, heart_rate, and pace are accepted by the server.

get_activity_intervals.name: get_activity_intervals
get_activity_intervals.description: Get analyzed intervals for one activity by activity_id, including scalar custom interval fields such as lactate under custom_fields when upstream includes them.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: intervals.icu activity ID.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: Include raw upstream fields; default terse mode strips nulls and returns normalized fields.

get_activity_messages.name: get_activity_messages
get_activity_messages.description: List comments and notes on one activity by activity_id.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: intervals.icu activity ID whose messages/comments should be listed.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: Include raw upstream message fields and preserve nulls.

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: Maximum messages to return; defaults to 100 and is capped at 200.

arguments.name: since_id
arguments.description: Return messages after this upstream message ID; zero means no cursor.

get_activity_splits.name: get_activity_splits
get_activity_splits.description: Get manual or virtual per-km/per-mile activity splits by activity_id.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose manual or virtual splits should be returned.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, preserve full response metadata during shaping; split rows remain terse and unit-disambiguated by default.

arguments.name: split_unit
arguments.description: Optional split distance unit. Defaults to the athlete's preferred_units when omitted, falling back to km.

get_activity_streams.name: get_activity_streams
get_activity_streams.description: Get canonical activity stream channels by activity_id.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose stream channels should be listed.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream stream payloads and samples for available stream channels; default returns metadata only unless keys is supplied.

arguments.name: keys
arguments.description: Optional stream keys to include as samples. Values are canonicalized to snake_case when known; unknown keys are reported in _meta. Supplying keys includes samples even when include_full is false.

get_athlete_profile.name: get_athlete_profile
get_athlete_profile.description: Get the configured athlete profile, FTP/thresholds, zones, and sport settings from intervals.icu.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include additional typed, non-secret profile and sport-setting identifiers. Defaults to false; raw upstream payloads and credentials are never returned.

get_best_efforts.name: get_best_efforts
get_best_efforts.description: Get upstream best efforts grouped by sport and default/requested power, heart-rate, and pace buckets.

arguments.name: distance_meters
arguments.description: Pace distance buckets. Defaults depend on sport: run-style 400,1000,1609,5000,10000m; swim 50,100,200,400,1500m.

arguments.name: duration_seconds
arguments.description: Power/HR duration buckets. Defaults to 5,15,30,60,300,1200,3600 seconds.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream curve arrays and activity maps.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Optional local end date YYYY-MM-DD. Supply with oldest or omit both for all-time.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Optional local start date YYYY-MM-DD. Supply with newest or omit both for all-time.

arguments.name: sports
arguments.description: Intervals.icu sports/types to fan out. Defaults to Ride, Run, Swim.

get_custom_item_by_id.name: get_custom_item_by_id
get_custom_item_by_id.description: Fetch one custom item by item_id and preserve its full content payload.

arguments.name: item_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu custom item ID.

get_custom_items.name: get_custom_items
get_custom_items.description: List custom item definitions such as charts, fields, streams, panels, histograms, maps, and zones.

arguments.name: item_type
arguments.description: Optional upstream custom-item type filter, for example FITNESS_CHART, INPUT_FIELD, ACTIVITY_FIELD, ACTIVITY_STREAM, ACTIVITY_PANEL, ACTIVITY_HISTOGRAM, ACTIVITY_MAP, ACTIVITY_HEATMAP, TRACE_CHART, FITNESS_TABLE, or ZONES.

get_event_by_id.name: get_event_by_id
get_event_by_id.description: Fetch a single calendar event detail by event_id.

arguments.name: date
arguments.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date hint. On detail 404, scans ±30 days around this date.

arguments.name: event_id
arguments.description: Required upstream event ID. Numeric upstream IDs should be passed as strings.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream event payload under event.full; default response is terse.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Optional athlete-local scan end YYYY-MM-DD. Must be paired with oldest and span at most 61 days.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Optional athlete-local scan start YYYY-MM-DD. Must be paired with newest and span at most 61 days.

arguments.name: resolve
arguments.description: Optional upstream resolve flag for the fallback list scan; defaults to true to recover recurring or derived event instances.

get_events.name: get_events
get_events.description: List calendar events across a bounded athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date range.

arguments.name: calendar_id
arguments.description: Optional upstream calendar ID filter.

arguments.name: category
arguments.description: Optional upstream event category filter. Documented upstream categories include WORKOUT, RACE_A, RACE_B, RACE_C, NOTE, PLAN, HOLIDAY, SICK, INJURED, SET_EFTP, FITNESS_DAYS, SEASON_START, TARGET, SET_FITNESS; see icuvisor://event-categories. Custom athlete/account category values are passed through.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include each raw upstream event payload under full; default rows are terse and null-stripped.

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: Maximum event rows to request; defaults to 100 and values above 500 are capped.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Required athlete-local end date YYYY-MM-DD; date range is capped at 366 days.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Required athlete-local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: resolve
arguments.description: Optional upstream resolve flag for recurring/derived events when supported by intervals.icu.

get_extended_metrics.name: get_extended_metrics
get_extended_metrics.description: Get one activity's upstream-exposed extended metrics by activity_id.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Intervals.icu activity ID to fetch extended metrics for.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream activity, interval, and power-vs-HR payloads. Default terse mode only returns upstream-exposed metrics and drops unavailable fields.

get_fitness.name: get_fitness
get_fitness.description: Get CTL, ATL, and TSB fitness trends for a local date range.

arguments.name: end_date
arguments.description: local end date as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream summary rows.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: local start date for fitness rows as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

get_fitness_projection.name: get_fitness_projection
get_fitness_projection.description: Use when the prompt asks to project CTL, ATL, or TSB forward; do not fetch get_fitness rows and model the curve in chat.

arguments.name: horizon_date
arguments.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD end date; provide either horizon_date or horizon_days, not both.

arguments.name: horizon_days
arguments.description: Optional number of days after start_date to simulate.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the projected daily CTL/ATL/TSB curve series.

arguments.name: model
arguments.description: Closed enum. Free-form physiology models are rejected; this tool only supports deterministic CTL/ATL/TSB impulse-response projection.

arguments.name: planned_daily_loads
arguments.description: Optional explicit planned training load values by athlete-local date; these replace modeled ramp load for matching dates.

arguments.name: recovery_week_cadence
arguments.description: Every Nth week uses recovery_week_load_pct of modeled load; use 0 to disable recovery weeks.

arguments.name: recovery_week_load_pct
arguments.description: Percent of modeled load used during recovery weeks.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: Athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date whose get_fitness CTL/ATL/TSB values seed the projection.

arguments.name: weekly_ramp_pct
arguments.description: Week-over-week percent change applied to modeled daily load when planned_daily_loads does not specify a day.

get_gear_list.name: get_gear_list
get_gear_list.description: List the athlete's intervals.icu gear with IDs and human-readable names for resolving activity gear_id fields.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream gear fields under each row's full object; default terse rows include gear_id, name/name_missing, type, brand, model, and retired.

arguments.name: refresh
arguments.description: When true, bypass the manual in-process per-athlete gear cache and fetch a fresh list from intervals.icu. Failed refreshes do not replace the last successful cache entry.

get_hr_curves.name: get_hr_curves
get_hr_curves.description: Get upstream-computed heart-rate best-effort curves for a date range.

arguments.name: duration_seconds
arguments.description: Heart-rate curve duration buckets in seconds. Defaults to 5,15,30,60,300,1200,3600 seconds; point values are heart_rate_bpm.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream curve arrays and activity maps.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Local end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional intervals.icu sport/type filter for the upstream type parameter. Omit to let upstream aggregate its default heart-rate curve set.

get_pace_curves.name: get_pace_curves
get_pace_curves.description: Get upstream-computed pace best-effort curves for a date range.

arguments.name: distance_meters
arguments.description: Pace curve distance buckets in meters. Defaults to 400,1000,1609,5000,10000m, or swim-style 50,100,200,400,1500m when sport contains Swim. Points include upstream elapsed_seconds plus either pace_seconds_per_km or pace_seconds_per_mile based on athlete units.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream curve arrays and activity maps.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Local end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional intervals.icu sport/type filter for the upstream type parameter. Omit to let upstream aggregate its default pace curve set.

get_planning_context.name: get_planning_context
get_planning_context.description: Fetch read-only weekly planning context without creating an ATP or calendar writes: athlete-local week events/workouts, active training-plan assignment summary, current fitness context, upcoming races, and caveats.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw source read payloads only: event full fields, fitness row full fields, and raw active training-plan assignment/nested payloads. This does not enable ATP creation or calendar writes.

arguments.name: week_start
arguments.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD date anchoring the planning week. The supplied date is normalized backward to Monday; omit to use the upcoming athlete-local Monday, with today used when today is Monday.

get_power_curves.name: get_power_curves
get_power_curves.description: Get the upstream-computed mean-maximal power curve for a date range.

arguments.name: duration_seconds
arguments.description: Power curve buckets to return. Defaults to 5,15,30,60,300,1200,3600 seconds.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream curve arrays and activity maps.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Local end date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Local start date YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Intervals.icu sport/type for the required upstream type parameter; defaults to Ride.

get_today.name: get_today
get_today.description: Answer how's today looking with one terse daily digest: today's CTL/ATL/TSB fitness, wellness, completed activities, planned events, and NOTE/race annotations.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream payloads under each digest section's rows. Defaults to false for a terse today digest.

get_training_plan.name: get_training_plan
get_training_plan.description: Fetch the athlete's active training-plan assignment, not calendar events or workout-library templates.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream training-plan assignment and nested plan/workout payload. Default mode returns assignment fields and lightweight plan summary only.

get_training_summary.name: get_training_summary
get_training_summary.description: Get aggregated training volume, neutral training load, sRPE, and upstream zone-order totals for a local date range.

arguments.name: end_date
arguments.description: local end date as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include raw upstream summary rows.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: local start date for summary rows as YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

get_wellness_data.name: get_wellness_data
get_wellness_data.description: Get daily wellness rows for a local date range with distinct sleepQuality, sleepScore, sleepSecs, nutrition keys calories_intake/carbs_g/protein_g/fat_g when present, custom fields, native provider sidecars, and provider-native provenance scale labels for sleep/readiness.

arguments.name: fields
arguments.description: Optional upstream wellness field names to request; custom fields are preserved when returned.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream wellness row under full and keep null fields.

arguments.name: newest
arguments.description: Local newest wellness date YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone, inclusive.

arguments.name: oldest
arguments.description: Local oldest wellness date YYYY-MM-DD in the athlete timezone.

get_workout_library.name: get_workout_library
get_workout_library.description: List workout-library folders and plans, not calendar events or the active training-plan assignment.

arguments.name: include_top_level_workouts
arguments.description: When true, also fetch all library workouts and include only those without a folder_id as top-level workout templates.

get_workouts_in_folder.name: get_workouts_in_folder
get_workouts_in_folder.description: List workout-library templates inside one folder or plan by folder_id.

arguments.name: folder_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu workout-library folder or plan ID. The public API lists all workouts, and icuvisor filters by this folder_id.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include each raw upstream workout_doc object verbatim. Default mode returns only workout_doc_summary.

icuvisor_check_server_version.name: icuvisor_check_server_version
icuvisor_check_server_version.description: Check whether the MCP client is using stale icuvisor tool descriptions after an upgrade.

icuvisor_list_advanced_capabilities.name: icuvisor_list_advanced_capabilities
icuvisor_list_advanced_capabilities.description: Use only when the user asks what other icuvisor tools are available or when a requested advanced/delete capability is not visible in the current tool catalog.

link_activity_to_event.name: link_activity_to_event
link_activity_to_event.description: Manually pair one completed activity with one planned calendar event when intervals.icu auto-pairing misses (forum #97).

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID to pair. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed; IDs are otherwise preserved exactly.

arguments.name: event_id
arguments.description: Required numeric intervals.icu planned event ID to set as the activity paired_event_id. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream updated activity payload under full; default returns a terse link confirmation.

list_athletes.name: list_athletes
list_athletes.description: List the coach-mode roster configured for this icuvisor server.

resolve_calendar_dates.name: resolve_calendar_dates
resolve_calendar_dates.description: Resolve athlete-local calendar anchors before planning, scheduling, or answering date-sensitive prompts such as today, tomorrow, next week, or N days from today.

arguments.name: base_date
arguments.description: Optional athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD base date. Defaults to today's date from the athlete timezone, not UTC or the chat client's timezone.

arguments.name: offsets
arguments.description: Integer day offsets from base_date. 0 is the base date, 1 is tomorrow, 7 is one week later, and negative values look backward. Each date is computed in the athlete timezone with calendar-day arithmetic.

select_athlete.name: select_athlete
select_athlete.description: Select the default target athlete for subsequent coach-mode tool calls in this MCP session.

arguments.name: athlete_id
arguments.description: Target athlete to select for this session. Format: i12345 or 12345.

set_activity_intervals.name: set_activity_intervals
set_activity_intervals.description: Set or correct the interval structure on one completed activity by writing a structured workout_doc as the activity's description; intervals.icu re-parses the DSL into rendered intervals overlaid on the recording.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID whose interval structure will be (re)written. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed; the i-prefix is preserved verbatim.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream updated-activity payload under full; default returns a terse confirmation.

arguments.name: prose
arguments.description: Optional free-text prose to interleave around the serialized steps; the upstream description retains the prose verbatim around the DSL block. Use the <!-- icuvisor:steps --> sentinel on its own line to choose where serialized steps are inserted. Omit to send the serialized DSL alone.

arguments.name: workout_doc
arguments.description: Required structured WorkoutDoc whose steps are serialized to the activity description DSL; intervals.icu re-parses the DSL into rendered intervals. Must contain at least one step. In each structured step, description is a label/comment only: do not include duration or distance tokens there; use duration seconds or distance instead. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax. Call validate_workout first if uncertain about the DSL.

update_activity.name: update_activity
update_activity.description: Rename and/or replace the free-text description of one completed activity by activity_id.

arguments.name: activity_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu activity ID. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed; the i-prefix is preserved verbatim.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional replacement free-text activity description; this is not append-only. Omit to leave unchanged; pass an explicit empty string to clear the description. Prose metadata only — to write structured intervals, use set_activity_intervals with a workout_doc.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream updated-activity payload under full; default returns a terse update confirmation.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Optional replacement activity title. Omit to leave unchanged. Empty strings are rejected to avoid accidentally blanking the title; intervals.icu's UI also rejects blank titles.

update_custom_item.name: update_custom_item
update_custom_item.description: Update one custom item definition by item_id with sparse fields only.

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: Optional sparse content patch. Validated against the existing item_type schema, then merged so omitted keys stay untouched; see icuvisor://custom-item-schemas.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional replacement custom item description. Omit to leave unchanged; empty strings are preserved when intentionally supplied.

arguments.name: hide_script
arguments.description: Optional replacement upstream hide_script flag. Omit to leave unchanged.

arguments.name: image
arguments.description: Optional replacement upstream image identifier or URL when supported by the custom-item type. Omit to leave unchanged.

arguments.name: index
arguments.description: Optional replacement display/order index. Omit to leave unchanged.

arguments.name: item_id
arguments.description: Required intervals.icu custom item ID to update. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Optional replacement custom item name. Omit to leave unchanged.

arguments.name: visibility
arguments.description: Optional replacement upstream visibility value. Omit to leave unchanged.

examples.description: Updated description for the coach dashboard.

update_sport_settings.name: update_sport_settings
update_sport_settings.description: Update one sport's FTP, threshold heart rate, threshold pace, or zone definitions.

arguments.name: effective_date
arguments.description: Required athlete-local effective date as YYYY-MM-DD; used as the oldest date for upstream sport-setting recompute.

arguments.name: ftp
arguments.description: Functional Threshold Power in watts for the selected sport.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Sport setting to update, matching intervals.icu sport type (for example Ride, Run, Swim).

arguments.name: threshold_hr
arguments.description: Threshold heart rate in bpm for the selected sport.

arguments.name: threshold_pace
arguments.description: Threshold pace with an explicit pace-duration unit; seconds_per_km is 4:15/km as 255 and seconds_per_mile is 8:00/mi as 480.

children.name: value
children.description: Threshold pace duration in the provided unit, not speed.

arguments.name: zones
arguments.description: Optional destructive replacement zone definitions. Supplying zones overwrites prior power/hr/pace zone definitions for this sport and is rejected unless ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full.

update_wellness.name: update_wellness
update_wellness.description: Update one athlete-local wellness row with sparse manual fields: subjective scales, measurements, injury text, and locked; legacy feel remains in the input schema for compatibility but rejects with field_not_writable: feel (not accepted by intervals.icu wellness write), device-owned sleepScore rejects with field_not_writable: sleepScore (device-managed), and _native rejects with field_not_writable: _native (bridge-managed).

arguments.name: abdomen
arguments.description: Manual abdomen circumference in cm.

arguments.name: bloodGlucose
arguments.description: Manual blood glucose in the upstream intervals.icu wellness unit.

arguments.name: bodyFat
arguments.description: Manual body fat percentage, 0-100%.

arguments.name: date
arguments.description: Required athlete-local wellness date as YYYY-MM-DD.

arguments.name: diastolic
arguments.description: Manual diastolic blood pressure in mmHg.

arguments.name: fatigue
arguments.description: 1-5 (athlete-reported fatigue); fatigue scale.

arguments.name: feel
arguments.description: 1-5 (athlete-reported feel); feel scale.

arguments.name: hrv
arguments.description: Manual HRV in milliseconds rMSSD.

arguments.name: include_full
arguments.description: When true, include the raw upstream wellness row under wellness.full and keep null fields.

arguments.name: injury
arguments.description: Optional free-text injury or limitation note. Preserved verbatim.

arguments.name: lactate
arguments.description: Manual blood lactate in mmol/L.

arguments.name: locked
arguments.description: When true, ask upstream to lock the wellness row against device-sync overwrites.

arguments.name: menstrualPhase
arguments.description: Menstrual phase as accepted by intervals.icu; free-text string until the upstream enum contract is verified.

arguments.name: mood
arguments.description: 1-5 (athlete-reported mood); mood scale.

arguments.name: motivation
arguments.description: 1-5 (athlete-reported motivation); motivation scale.

arguments.name: respiration
arguments.description: respiration: breaths per minute.

arguments.name: restingHR
arguments.description: Manual resting heart rate in bpm.

arguments.name: sleepQuality
arguments.description: 1-4 (athlete-entered, 1=poor 4=great); sleepQuality scale.

arguments.name: soreness
arguments.description: 1-5 (athlete-reported soreness); soreness scale.

arguments.name: spO2
arguments.description: spO2: blood oxygen saturation percentage 0-100.

arguments.name: stress
arguments.description: 1-5 (athlete-reported stress); stress scale.

arguments.name: systolic
arguments.description: Manual systolic blood pressure in mmHg.

arguments.name: vo2max
arguments.description: vo2max: ml/kg/min.

arguments.name: weight
arguments.description: Manual body weight in the athlete's preferred weight unit from get_athlete_profile (_meta.units / units.weight); converted to upstream kg at the API boundary.

update_workout.name: update_workout
update_workout.description: Update one reusable workout-library template by workout_id with sparse fields only.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional replacement for the upstream workout description/DSL, not append-only notes. Omit to leave unchanged. Supplying description without workout_doc can replace existing structured steps; provide the desired workout_doc to preserve or merge structure. May be supplied with workout_doc; use the <!-- icuvisor:steps --> sentinel on its own line to choose where serialized steps are inserted. Empty strings without workout_doc are rejected to avoid accidentally clearing structured workout content.

arguments.name: folder_id
arguments.description: Optional replacement intervals.icu workout-library folder or plan ID. Omit to leave unchanged; an explicit empty string moves the workout to the top level when upstream supports it.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Optional replacement workout-library template name/title. Omit to leave unchanged.

arguments.name: sport
arguments.description: Optional replacement upstream sport/activity type such as Ride, Run, Swim, or the athlete account's configured activity type. Omit to leave unchanged. Include with workout_doc when icuvisor should use athlete sport settings to disambiguate zone target suffixes.

arguments.name: tags
arguments.description: Optional replacement workout-library tags. Omit to leave unchanged; provide the full desired tag list when appending a tag.

arguments.name: workout_doc
arguments.description: Optional replacement structured WorkoutDoc for the upstream workout description/DSL. Serialized and merged with description when both are supplied; empty steps clear structured content. Include the desired steps when changing prose so the replacement description/DSL preserves workout structure. In each structured step, description is a label/comment only: do not include duration or distance tokens there; use duration seconds or distance instead. Include sport in the same request when zone targets should be serialized using athlete sport settings; otherwise workout_doc uses the no-sport serializer. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax.

arguments.name: workout_id
arguments.description: Required upstream workout-library template ID to update. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

validate_workout.name: validate_workout
validate_workout.description: Validate an intervals.icu workout description, a structured workout_doc, or both, and return the canonical merged DSL plus estimated duration that icuvisor would submit on a write.

arguments.name: description
arguments.description: Optional free-text intervals.icu description. Prose, headers, comments, and any line the DSL parser does not recognize as a structured step pass through verbatim. Embed the sentinel '<!-- icuvisor:steps -->' on its own line to control where structured steps from workout_doc are inserted in the merged canonical DSL. Structured-step lines start with '- ' or are 'Nx' repeat headers; dashed repeat-like lines such as '-3 x' are also validated so malformed repeat syntax surfaces as PARSE_ERROR. Syntax reference: icuvisor://workout-syntax.

arguments.name: workout_doc
arguments.description: Optional structured WorkoutDoc with a steps[] array. Validated via the same Serialize path that write tools use. In each structured step, description is a label/comment only: do not include duration or distance tokens there; use duration seconds or distance instead. Mutually compatible with description; when both contain structured steps, workout_doc wins and the response surfaces a STEP_SOURCES_OVERRIDDEN warning.

examples.description:
Threshold day. Keep cadence above 85.
<!-- icuvisor:steps -->
Cool down well.
